ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the experiment in seconds */,
  "round_epochs" INTEGER /* Number of rounds of epochs completed */,
  "loss" REAL /* Training loss */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Training accuracy */,
  "recall" REAL /* Training recall */,
  "precision" REAL /* Training precision */,
  "val_loss" REAL /* Validation loss */,
  "val_accuracy" REAL /* Validation accuracy */,
  "val_recall" REAL /* Validation recall */,
  "val_precision" REAL /* Validation precision */,
  "act_fn" TEXT /* Activation function used */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during training */,
  "client_lr" REAL /* Client learning rate */,
  "client_momentum" REAL /* Client momentum */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "hardware_config" TEXT /* Hardware configuration used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this configuration belongs to */,
  "model_architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs */,
  "act_fn" TEXT /* Activation function */,
  "client_lr" REAL /* Client learning rate */,
  "client_momentum" REAL /* Client momentum */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the model configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this metric belongs to */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "loss" REAL /* Training loss */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Training accuracy */,
  "recall" REAL /* Training recall */,
  "precision" REAL /* Training precision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this metric belongs to */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "loss" REAL /* Validation loss */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Validation accuracy */,
  "recall" REAL /* Validation recall */,
  "precision" REAL /* Validation precision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the note was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tag was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
